title: White Dried Ghast
body:
**The White Dried Ghast Pack**

_The textures that change are:_

- The Dried Ghast Hydration 0
- The Dried Ghast Hydration 1
- The Dried Ghast Hydration 2
- The Dried Ghast Hydration 3

If you want to take inspiration from my pack, no problem — just make sure to mention Nothy1 :)
